hero.subtitle: Stop struggling with manual workflows. Aetheris is the visual interface that gives your AI super memory, plug-and-play skills, and a unified GUI.

main.tagline: Intelligent digital tools for modern business

cards.title: Business Automation
texts: We automate key company processes — from lead handling to internal operations.
Automatic processing of leads and requests
Process optimization and team load balancing

cards.title: Client Communications
texts: We build client communication systems that run automatically 24/7.

cards.title: Web Platforms and Landing Pages
texts: Development of modern web solutions as part of a unified business system.

cards.title: Integrations and AI Solutions
texts: We unify services, data, and AI into a single business infrastructure.

about.title: About Aetheris
about.description: Aetheris is a team focused on business process automation and intelligent workflow development.
about.p1: We help companies reduce manual work, streamline operations, and implement modern automation tools that improve efficiency and scalability.
about.p2: Our work includes designing automated systems, integrating AI-assisted tools, and building custom solutions tailored to specific business needs.
about.p3: Our goal is to simplify complex workflows and help businesses operate more efficiently.

support.title: Support
support.description: If you have questions about our work or want to discuss a potential automation project, you can contact us directly.
support.response: We aim to respond to inquiries as soon as possible.
support.request: Please include a short description of your request or project.
